meta.question: In which language are the organization's models written? (Organization ID: 5e1278d2bfce434b95e80ab3625cdc63)
meta.finalAnswer: The organization's models (Organization ID: 5e1278d2bfce434b95e80ab3625cdc63) are written in Serbian. The model names contain Serbian words such as "koreografija" (choreography), "Klijent" (client), "operater" (operator), "Obrada klijentskog zahteva" (processing client request), "slanje paketa" (sending packages), "Picerija" (pizzeria), "četvrtak" (Thursday), and "Vezbe" (exercises).
